message.content:
@startuml
participant generate_delta_main.cc as "generate_delta_main.cc"
participant delta_diff_generator.cc as "delta_diff_generator.cc"
participant payload_file.cc as "payload_file.cc"
participant payload_generation_config.cc as "payload_generation_config.cc"

"generate_delta_main.cc" ..|> "payload_generation_config.cc" : "--dynamic_partition_info_file"

"generate_delta_main.cc" ..|> "payload_generation_config.cc" : brillo::KeyValueStore.Load(file)

"generate_delta_main.cc" ..|> "payload_generation_config.cc" : payload_config.target.LoadDynamicPartitionMetadata(store)

"generate_delta_main.cc" ..|> "payload_generation_config.cc" : payload_config.target.ValidateDynamicPartitionMetadata()

"generate_delta_main.cc" ..|> "delta_diff_generator.cc" : GenerateUpdatePayloadFile()

"delta_diff_generator.cc" ..|> "payload_file.cc" : payload.Init(config)

"payload_file.cc" ..|> "payload_generation_config.cc" : manifest_.dynamic_partition_metadata

"payload_file.cc" ..|> "delta_diff_generator.cc" : generate payload data

"delta_diff_generator.cc" ..|> "payload_file.cc" : payload.WritePayload()

"payload_file.cc" ..|> "payload_generation_config.cc" : manifest_.SerializeToString()

"payload_file.cc" ..|> "payload_generation_config.cc" : Write(serialized_manifest.data())

"generate_delta_main.cc" ..|> "delta_diff_generator.cc" : done

@enduml
